1.content:
From high above in the sky, the scene pans down to a large massive continent that seemed like an island far away but was very massive up close. This was Saga. It is a place of unlimited potential and can bring many changes to people be they from here or from some place far far away. There are five ways to interact with Saga as a whole.

1. Being a King or Queen: Playing as the ruler of a kingdom has its perks such as free reign to explore your chosen kingdom and to attend certain royal gatherings.

2. Being Prince or Princess: Not quite as much power as a king or queen but have more of a chance to interact with those their own age in a school setting or royal event.

3. Whisked Away Visitors: People from the normal human world who were whisked away from their homes and families and brought to Saga for some unknown reason.

4. Random Residents: Normal, well Saga Normal, people who live their day to day lives trying to make a living and supporting themselves or their families.

5. Sage: Become Saga's ruler itself and change things anyway you see fit. You can become a benevolent ruler...or a power fueled dictator.

Now...pick your poison.
1.title: Welcome to Saga

11.content:
Becoming a royal is certainly a fun way to live in a kingdom. But which royal do you want to be?

Lady Victoria
Occupation: High Priestess and Ruler of the Holy Kingdom
Age: 24
Personality: A young woman who, like most of the people of her kingdom, seem to worship Sage as a goddess and are willing to do anything to please her and uphold her rules.


Lady Tsu
Occupation: Yokuzuna and Ruler of Sumo Kingdom
Age: 29
Personality: Caring and usually having a large hunger but a strong body. Though her size does make it difficult getting in and out of doorways.

Azure
Occupation: Queen of Blueberry Kingdom
Age: 19
Personality: Recently became the queen after her father grew too large to fit on the train way. She is kind and caring and polite even though she is a giant ball of juice.

Leonidas
Occupation: Tribal leader and King of Wild Kingdom
Age: 40
Personality: A large lion anthro who commands with seriousness and a willing to protect his tribe from invaders. Loves to battle

So...which ruler will you be?
11.title: Kings and Queens

choices: Lady Tsu would get ready for leaving for the Central Kingdom...
Lady Tsu decides to hold a farewell feast before she leaves...
112.content:
The Sumo Kingdom, a rather large kingdom located near the Central Kingdom where size and weight determines almost everything. The large are encouraged to get larger, and sumo matches are celebrated at the very center of the kingdom, known as the Big Dohyo Castle.

And sitting upon the throne at this castle is a rather huge woman by the name of Tsu, who is not only the queen of the kingdom, but also it’s Yokozuna. Her hair a dark shade of blue and tied in a top knot, the woman has become big enough to outsize some of the people from the Blueberry Kingdom, and her gut alone is as big as the average citizen of her kingdom.

As she stood in her seat watching the sumo matches that were held everyday in her castle however, she would quickly have her attention be interrupted by one of her servants.

“Uh, Lady Tsu...”

“Yes, kind sir?” Looking down from her throne, Tsu would end up seeing a rather meek servant, one of the few people in her kingdom that were thin, and as such were allowed the honor of making sure the kingdom maintained it’s prosperity.

“Well Lady Tsu, it’s almost that time of month. You know, the meeting between all the royals at Central Kingdom, and...”

“Ah, I see. Thank you for telling me about this...” Raising her hand upward, almost everyone in the castle would stop, as she rose from her seat, the ground around her shaking as she took one titanic step after the other...
112.title: Tsu

choices: She went to converse with her fellow royals
She  witnessed Sage giving the keynote to everyone during the welcome feast
1123.content:
Once a year, comes a special gathering where for the next 7 days, the royal leaders of every kingdom as well as nobles and appointed leaders come to the Central Kingdom where they gather and chat and discuss as well as listen to the words of Sage, the ruler and creator of all of Saga. This is the event known as the Royal Gathering.

"Oh...oh my. It feels as though these train cars get smaller and smaller every year." Tsu said squeezing herself out of the train car.

"Well well...it seems you've somehow managed to get here once again." said a young vampire.

"Well if it isn't the young lord of Vampire Kingdom." Tsu said. "Amazing...you've gotten paler." she giggled.

"Yes and you've gotten bigger, is such a thing were possible." Vlad said.

"So where are we meeting this year?" Tsu asked.

"They're set us up at the Royalty Hotel...the one connected to Central Castle. Apparently Lady Sage is staying there as well." Vlad said.

"Its always such an honor to look upon her.' Tsu said as the two headed off.

After Tsu had gotten settled down...

choices: “The giant egg of the Egg Kingdom, it is about to hatch...”
“I’d like to announce a new kingdom here effective immediately!”
“I’d like to announce a new award system for exceptional Kingdoms...”
11232.content:
Heading off into the Royalty Hotel, Lady Tsu would struggle to get through the doors of the big hotel, but after getting a bit of help from some of the hotel’s valets, the sumo queen would walk in, enjoying the fancy furniture of all sizes. Before she could head off to explore herself, she would quickly see a old friend...

“Oh, Dyane! Long time no see!”

“Oh crud, it’s you Tsu! Haven’t seen you for a month! How ya been girl?”

Flying up onto Tsu’s belly would be the Queen of the Harpy Kingdom, a tan-skinned eagle harpy named Dyane. Barely coming up to Tsu’s shoulders in height, Dyane was rather tall for a person (considering Tsu’s own unnatural 9 foot height and massive fat), and with her powerful wings, she could carry and fly around rather easily, even with a slowly developing potbelly on her frame.

“So, how are you doing girl? You enjoying yourself back at your kingdom of harpies?”

“Eh I’ve enjoyed it somewhat...” Dyane would sigh as she rubbed her belly a bit. “Though I do envy your size a bit as well as how you don’t have to worry about your figure to fight. If I could be around your size...”

“Oh please, it’s not just size that matters in-“

“Hey, I’m serious here! I really do wish I could be like you a bit... maybe just in terms of fat... look, I’m already developing a bit of a potbelly.”

Noticing her friend’s small belly, the sumo would sigh a bit as she rolled the harpy offf her own massive gut. “As much as I like how your enjoying my lifestyle, you gotta rule your kingdom your own way. What if all the other harpies copied you and started gaining weight until they wouldn’t be able to fly?”

“W-well...”

“Exactly. I do appreciate your effort, but we both got kingdoms to rule. Maybe when you find a person to replace you I’ll take you under my wings, but for now you gotta be an example for your people...”

“Fine...” As Dyane would get back onto her feet, the two would be interrupted by a bell signifying the meeting starting. Quickly rushing to the big hall table, both rulers would sit next to each other, as they watched Sage begin announcing...
11232.title: Friends among Royalty

choices: Later that night, Tsu hangs with the girls
Later in the week as everyone returns home
One month after the implement of the award system
112323.content:
Sage slowly walked to the high balcony looking over the rulers as her hair glistened in the light. "My rulers...after some consideration, it has been decided...we'll be creating a new award system." she said.

"An award system?" asked Azure, queen of Blueberry Kingdom.

"Indeed. Every month, each kingdom will continue as is and earn points via their usual exploits such as trade and the like." Sage said. "Kingdom with the highest results shall receive a special award and a privlege. The most successful kingdom..will have the pleasure of making one of the other 169 kingdoms become their subordinates and follow their rule. The only kingdoms exempt will be Central and Egg."

"So the winner can absorb any kingdom they wish?" Tsu pondered. "Is she...serious about this?"

"That is all I will say for now." Sage said as she departed.

"Lady Sage...are you sure this is wise?" an attendant asked.

"Think of this as an experiment. I just simply want to see how they will take this opportunity." Sage said returning to her room.
112323.title: The Awards

choices: Dyane asks to spend the whole day with Tsu...
Tsu wakes up to a argument breaking out between two Royals...
Tsu ends up exploring the Royalty Hotel some more...
1123231.content:
Later that night, after the Royal Meeting had concluded, Lady Tsu would meet up with some of the other royal women to enjoy time together while discussing the new rewards system. Among these people included her friend Dyane, Queen Andromeda of the Star Kingdom, Queen Azure of the Blueberry Kingdom, and Artemis, a princess/goddess of Olympus Kingdom and next in line to rule after Zeus.

Deciding to meet up at the Royalty Hotel’s big pool, Lady Tsu would have a few valets help stuff her gargantuan figure into a black and red bikini swimsuit, before heading off. Her bra was very tight at the moment, but she had no time to get a bra at a bigger size before she could leave.

Arriving at the pool, Tsu could already see the others enjoying their time swimming, with Azure waving at her while floating on the water. “Hey Tsu, jump on in the water’s fine!”

“Eh, I wouldn’t want to cause a small tsunami, so I think I’ll just slowly get in...”

Stepping down into the pool slowly, Tsu would swim over to the others as they were beginning to talk. While Andromeda was staying quiet the whole time and just simply relaxing, the others were in a heated debate.

“...yeah, and when I win this little competition, I’ll make the Sumo Kingdom my vassal! That way I can enjoy the best of both worlds!”

“Uh I think that would only work if it was the other way around Dyane...” Artemis would cross her arms as she floated in the water. “Besides, my boss Zeus has way more power than your kingdom, pretty sure our Kingdom will win...”

“Now, now...” Tsu would butt in as she swam up to the two, worrying that a fight would break out if this continued. “I’m sure both of your kingdoms are fine enough as they are...”

Almost immediately, both of them would raise their voices, saying “No, obviously I’ll win! I have the better kingdom!”

It would be at this point that Andromeda would finally raise her voice. “Personally, my opinion is that the Seaside Kingdom will win. They are probably the second most peaceful Kingdom on this planet, and their queen actually works to better their citizens, unlike the two of you.”

“Oh shut up!” Artemis would try to splash Andromeda at that comment, only for the cosmic ruler to move the water out of her way. “Your only jealous of the Olympus Kingdom...”

“Not really. You do know what Zeus is like right?”

“Shut up...”

As the night continued, the women would continue to talk about each other’s kingdoms, as well as about the new reward system and other things discussed at the Gathering. Eventually, as dusk would set in, the women would begin leaving one by one, until the pool was completely empty and they would clock in for the night.

The next morning...

Go down to breakfast with a few friends

Tsu would go back to bed too were she not wide awake. Now that she was up, she thought about...

112323121.content:
After thinking for a bit, Tsu would eventually decide to head off to explore some more of the Central Kingdom, with one of her friends. Calling Azure first due to both sharing a similar size problem, the blueberry woman was unfortunately busy spending the day with Andromeda, leaving for the woman to call upon her other Royal friend, Dyane.

Thankfully for Tsu, the Harpy Queen had nothing much to do today, so the two would quickly meet at the front of the hotel once the fighting between Gearga and Nathaniel would stop. Watching the Harpy woman approach with some casual street clothes , the sumo queen would smile a bit.

“Ah, did not expect you to wear casual clothes for our... little day together.”

“Oh please, I enjoy wearing these casual clothes, they’re so comfortable to fly in! I’m surprised your still wearing your royal kimono though...”

Being poked in the belly by Dyane’s wings for a bit, Tsu would blush as she stepped back a bit. “It’s just, I still gotta look a bit professional outside my kingdom. Besides, they don’t make casual clothes in my size outside the Giant’s Kingdom, and that’s so far away from Sumo Kingdom...”

“Don’t worry about it!” Dyane would quickly pat Tsu on the back, causing the sumo queen to blush even harder for a split second. “We’ll get someone from the Tailor Kingdom to sew up some clothes for you! They serve in making clothes for everyone after all... Now let’s get some breakfast, I’m starving!”

Quickly feeling her stomach growl alongside her friend’s, Tsu would simply sigh and nod as she slowly walked with Dyane, looking for a place to eat. Eventually, after a bit of searching, they would find a Western Kingdom-styled breakfast saloon, where after struggling to get Tsu through the door, the two would sit down and eat.

As the two are though...

choices: Tsu goes home and prepares to try winning the awards game.
Dyane invites Tsu to visit her kingdom on the way home, looking quite fatter...
Tsu ends up running into another Royal on the way to the trains...
1123231211.content:
Ordering a heaping plate of sausage and eggs within a bowl, despite Tsu getting what would be relatively to her a small breakfast meal, it would be considered a huge meal to anyone else, except maybe the Gluttony Kingdom. As she dug into it, she would fall into a blissful state of eating, feeling the savory breakfast enter her gut and enjoying it...

As for Dyane however, Tsu would barely even notice the harpy Queen getting a bowl that was stacked even taller than Tsu’s own, with just sausage, biscuits, and gravy within it. As the two ate, their bellies would stick out further and further, until eventually both of them would end up completely stuffed...

“Oof, normally I’d push myself beyond this feeling but I want to fit on the train so I can head back home...”

“Honestly Tsu, I could go for a bit more too... but if I eat any more I feel like my belly is gonna burst...”

Finally noticing the harpy’s belly, at this time a giant round orb, Tsu would reach around and rub it a bit to try calming it down. “Wow, your belly’s so big now... are you sure you can fly like this?”

“Yeah... just have to *bwoooarp* let it digest fully...”

Letting each other’s bellies digest for a bit again, the two would end up leaving from the saloon stuffed, Tsu carrying Dyane by the shoulders as the two would continue looking for more places to explore in the Central Kingdom. While Tsu simply enjoyed her time, Dyane had a spark ignite in her, a spark that envied Tsu’s size and wanted to be just as big, if not bigger...

By the end of the week...
1123231211.title: Dyane would surprise Tsu by eating more than her!

choices: Tsu returns home where she's treated to a welcoming back feast
Curious, Tsu decides to sneak into Central Castle and confront Sage
One month later, Tsu is fully immersed in the award system
11232312113.content:
Tsu had just finished packing her bags as well as checking out of the hotel as she prepared to head out towards the trains so she could return home.

"It'll be so nice to be back home. True the food here was glorious but they serve it in such small portions." Tsu said holding her large belly before seeing a figure standing in her path. Standing there was a man with clothing decorated with clock pieces and gears as he checked his watch. "I...know you. You're the ruler of the Time Kingdom."

"Indeed I am." he said. "It looks as though you're leaving a little early today."

"Well, it is the last day and the people of my kingdom must miss me. Plus I wouldn't want to be late to start on this award system." Tsu said.

"Hmm...a friendly word of advice, don't fall too deeply into the world of glitz and glamour." he said shutting his watch. "This whole land is her testing ground."

'Wait, what do you..." Tsu said before blinking and seeing that the man had vanished right before her eyes. "A testing ground?"
11232312113.title: Chance Meeting

choices: Tsu would find her food digested, and her body clearly larger...
Tsu would be awakened by one of her servants, seems there’s a kingdom problem...
Tsu would wake just in time to defend her title as Yokozuna...
112323121131.content:
While the idea of Saga being a testing ground would linger in Lady Tsu’s mind, the woman would mostly forget about it as she said goodbye to her royal friends, before fitting back into the train. As she got back home however, she would quickly find a long line of women waiting for her back home...

“Welcome back!”

As Tsu would get out of the train car and back onto solid land, she would be surrounded by cheering from a wide variety of heavy and rotund sumo wrestlers, all weighing in at around the 300-600 pound range. They were nowhere near Tsu’s own weight class, but their many numbers would make the heavy empress smile.

“We’ve prepared a really big feast for you, my Queen! With food from all over the world too!”

“Thank you so much!” Tsu would quickly pick up and hug the sumo who had said that, a rather average (at least by the kingdom’s standards) sized woman by the name of Jin, enveloping her body in her extremely wide belly, before putting her back down and following her scent.

Eventually, Tsu would follow the scent to what appeared to be a humongous table stacked with piles among piles of bowls, filled with the richest and most juicy of fish fillets, as well as heaps of rice. Picking up a bowl, Tsu would feel it’s weight as she judged it’s size to be around the size of a small person.

“Ah, this is so generous! But I’m not sure if I’ll be able to eat it all... I have quite a big appetite, but I’m not that big...”

“Nonsense, this is a celebration for the whole Kingdom! You won’t be the only one eating it by a long shot!”

Upon hearing that, Tsu would sigh a bit before digging in, the whole crowd of sumo wrestlers joining her in their feast. All in all, while only half of the table would be cleared by the end of the day, Tsu would manage to clear out over a hundred pounds of food from the bowls by herself, with Jin impressing her queen by eating half as much as her despite her relatively smaller size.

As Tsu would finish eating though, she would end up in a food coma, sleeping in her specially designed chair while clutching her swollen and filled belly. As morning would approach...
112323121131.title: Back Home

choices: “I need some help dieting, gather our Royal Council.”
“I’d like to set new size classes to help keep my kingdom from getting too big..
“I wanna call the Temperance Kingdom. I need to lose weight NOW.”
1123231211311.content:
Waking up in her chair, Tsu would very quickly find it to be very snug on her behind, and as she would try to break out from it she would accidentally break it, causing her to fall to the floor and land on her ass a bit hard.

“Ow! Ugh, now I have to get a new throne...”

Quickly rising up, Tsu would be quick to notice that the world seemed somewhat... shorter than it did before.While her own belly fat seems to only grow out a few inches, she seemed to feel a foot taller, and as she looked at Jin, who was still sleeping at the time, she would see that the meal had caused her to also grow a bit, both in fat and overall size.

“Ah crud, I can’t keep eating like this... if I keep up with these feasts after coming home every year I may not be able to fit in my own castle...”

Heading off and out of the feast hall, Tsu would quickly go out and finally measure her weight, to see how massive she had finally become. After having a few servants bring out the biggest scale they had, Tsu would slowly and nervously step on.

“Let’s see... 3400 pounds!? Oh Sage, I knew I was massive but this massive!? That’s it, I think I’m gonna start maintaining a diet, at least to stop all this growing!”

Getting to her throne, Tsu would sit back in it, finding it a tight fit as she would ring a bell for one of her servants, so that she could make a order.

“Ah, Lady Tsu... what do you wish of us?”
1123231211311.title: Ever Bigger Tsu

choices: Would sneak out in the night and sneak into the Temperance Kingdom
Suck it up and lose weight at the Fitness Kingdom
Throw a match for the title of ruler so she will get less meals
11232312113113.content:
"Call the Temperance Kingdom! I need to lose weight now!" Tsu said.

"But my queen, the Temperance Kingdom is one of the Reformation Kingdoms. You can't get access there unless you are a criminal." he said.

"Well there has to be something we can do. I can't keep living like this." Tsu said.

"Well...we could send you to the fitness kingdom." he said.

"Oh..." Tsu said. "I've met its ruler before and she always has pushed me to try and lose all of my weight till I'm as skinny as her. True we both eat the same amount but her crazy high metabolism always makes her thin by the end of the day. Treats me like a child."

"Well not sure what else we can do in a situation like this. That may be your only option sadly." he said.

"Oh, he's right. And if I can't enter the Temperance Kingdom without becoming a criminal...no. Can't do that. It would be a major dishonor on myself. No...I need a plan that would allow me to lose this weight without causing me to go down a dark path." Tsu pondered in hurry.
11232312113113.title: Losing Weight...Seriously?

choices: The training works perfectly! Tsu's back to a proper size for a Sumo Queen!
The training doesn't work as Tsu intended, it's only made her hungrier!
While training, Tsu notices Artemis there as well, on vacation...
112323121131132.content:
As Tsu would think about the choices she had overnight, she would think a bit about what would happen if she did go to the Temperance Kingdom. Sure, she would get thin near instantly, but if anyone would notice her in that kingdom, she could potentially have major trouble, not just with it's Queen, but possibly with Sage herself as well as possibly the other Reformation Kingdom rulers, which would be very bad from a global perspective...

Eventually, as Tsu would wake up on her gigantic bed, she would call for her servants once more.

"Ugh... make a call to Queen Fit... I'm heading off to the Fitness Kingdom for the weekend..."

Getting her stuff packed by her servants, Tsu would eventually head off to the train, slowly fitting her body through the train doors as she sat down and waited for the train to move. As it did, she would slowly see her own Kingdom fade in the distance, as she could see other Kingdoms come and go as she headed further and further from the center of Saga.

Eventually though, Tsu would make it to the Fitness Kingdom, and while she would feel a bit hungry from hours of being in a train car without food, she would ignore her hunger due to wanting to lose weight. Squeezing out of the train car's doors onto the outside world though, Tsu would forget about her hunger as she would notice a peculiar sight.

It was Queen Fit, wearing a fancy dress rather than her usual fitness shorts and bra.

"Wow Fit... what's with the duds?"

"Oh, it's nothing..." Fit would glare at Tsu a bit, before sighing. "I got engaged to this guy from the Giant's Kingdom, and we plan on marrying by the end of the month?"

"Oh yeah, I forgot you were single, you know, cause of you being the queen... well either way congrats!" Tsu would clap as she sat down for now in front of Fit. "So, you said you were marrying someone from the Giant's Kingdom? Aren't you half-giant yourself due to your father being from there as well?"

"Yeah, yeah... I know..."

Being one of the few queens who has had parents from two Kingdoms, Fit had shown genes from both her mother and her father, proving to be both tall and somewhat muscular. Naturally around 2 feet taller than Tsu herself, Fit managed to have a muscular body, with nary an ounce of fat on her, which she would claim as proof that it was beneficial sometimes to marry out of Kingdom for Royals.

"So, I guess you wanna finally give being thin a try then by coming here? I thought you didn't want to be rail thin since you had to be a person your kingdom could look up to?"

"No... I simply wanna lose a bit of weight, so I can go back to fitting in my throne. If I ended up entirely thin, I'd lose my title as Yokozuna and potentially my role as Queen as well..."

"Ugh, fine... Well I guess if you want to lose just a bit of weight I'll have to do some light training for you rather than the standard Fitness Kingdom course. Hope your ready for that!" With that, Fit would help Tsu up to her feet and grab her by the sumo's pudgy hands, before dragging her off.
112323121131132.title: Suck it up and lose weight at the Fitness Kingdom

choices: Her hunger wins out and she goes on a food eating rampage
Before she can fall for her urges, something distracts her.
1123231211311321.content:
Tsu spent weeks training with the fitness queen doing various things such as jogging and weightlifting before Tsu was back down to much more manageable weight. "Ah. I feel so incredible. I haven't felt this powerful or energetic since I was a teenager." Tsu giggled.

"Just try not to make it a habit of gaining so much and ended up here." Fit said. "After all, I'm not always going to be here to save your big butt from the threat of immobility."

"I'll keep that in mind." Tsu said. "And good luck with that marriage of yours. He's gonna be one lucky fella."

"Don't worry. I'll be fine." Fit said as she headed off back to her gym like castle.

"Thank god I can finally...' Tsu said as she smelled the air. "What is...' she said looking to a map of Fitness Kingdom. "Wait, its sitting between the Food, Sweet and Chef Kingdom?! Right...she set it here to try and get those coming here to lose weight to try and resist temptation." she said as he stomach growled. "No! We just got back to a proper weight." she said.

Tsu tried her best to resist her urges and then...
1123231211311321.title: A Proper Sumo

choices: The next day comes, turns out her Kingdom had won the Awards!
The next day comes, her kingdom didn't win but it's still doing fine.
The next day, Tsu learns her kingdom is being absorbed by the Harpy Kingdom!?
11232312113113213.content:
Trying to resist her urges to stop by the three food-based kingdoms surrounding the Fitness Kingdom, Tsu would make her way to the train cars as fast as she could, resisting the urge to get a ticket for the Sweets Kingdom and simply getting a ticket to head back home. As she waited for the train to the Sumo Kingdom to arrive though, Tsu would see two figures, one of them familiar, arrive from a different train that had just arrived.

"Hmm? Oh, it's you again Tsu..."

"Oh, so that's the sumo queen you were talking about Artemis? I honestly expected bigger, but she at least looks pretty nice..."

Coming out of the train would be Artemis, the Goddess of the Hunt, as well as one of her fellow goddess friends, Demeter. Watching the two come out from the train, Tsu would notice that Artemis was carrying a particularly noticeable potbelly, which was poking out from her robes, and her cheeks seemed the slightest bit chubbier.

"Ah, it's nice to see you Artemis... I assume your here to diet too?"

"What!? No!" Artemis would blush as she heard Tsu's comments. "I... I was just escorting Demeter here since she wanted to build some muscle after we stopped at the Chef Kingdom to bring them a harvest for their upcoming Chef Exams! Besides, why would I need to diet!?"

"I mean... you have been getting a bit chubby..." Demeter would look at Artemis's small potbelly as well, causing the goddess of the hunt to blush even harder. "Maybe you could exercise with me?"

"I said I don't need to exercise!"

With that, Artemis would stomp off, back inside the train she had come out from as Demeter would simply sigh. "Sorry about that, miss Tsu... Artemis is very concerned about her figure, and doesn't take criticism about it well. The name's Demeter."

"Ah, it's nice to meet you Demeter! The name's Tsu, and as your fellow princess said I'm the queen of the Sumo Kingdom. We put on some of the best fights in Saga as a whole, so after your done here why not visit?"

"Hmm... sure. I'm only here a week, so when I'm done I'll come and visit... well provided you aren't absorbed by another kingdom. The end of the month's tomorrow after all."

"Tomorrow!? I thought I was only here a few days! Uh, it was nice to meet you but I gotta head back to my kingdom!"

Waving goodbye as she ran from Demeter, Tsu would notice the train heading to the Sumo Kingdom arrive, and as she hopped on she would quickly sit down in her train car, intent on getting home. As the train made it's way closer to both the center and the Sumo Kingdom, Tsu would worry more and more on what could have happened while she was gone, but as dusk would settle and the train would arrive, the woman would notice everyone asleep, with her simply deciding to wait for the next morning to see what had happened...
11232312113113213.title: Artemis Doesn't Need to Diet!

choices: Tsu seems to be mysteriously losing weight.
She gets a visit from Artemis who is much bigger than she remembers
She is challenged by someone for the title of queen
112323121131132132.content:
The next morning, Tsu got up bright and early before anyone else in the kingdom as she made her way over to the train station where the announcement board had a new announcement pinned to the board.

"We announce that after the results and calculations of the first ever award ceremony...we have a winner and it is...Beach Queen Lola of the Seaside Kingdom." Tsu read. "Seems Andromeda was right. She always seems right in the end." she said before going back to reading. choices: Ranya’s huge, but not used to her weight. Tsu wins!

1123231211311321323.content:
A week after the results of the first monthly rewards, Tsu would be lying out on her throne, watching a sumo match within her castle while enjoying a light lunch. Ever since she had returned from the Fitness Kingdom, she had maintained her one ton weight with careful diet planning, and she had occasionally called Queen Fit for advice as well.

After the match though, as Tsu would get up for dinner, she would quickly hear a couple of extremely heavy thuds, as a gargantuan woman would squeeze her way through the doors, breaking the frame and parts of the wall in the process as their massive frame fit through it...

"Hey! Queen Tsu! I finally broke out from the Gluttony Kingdom, and after a trip to the Giant's Kingdom I think I'm finally ready to get revenge! Face me, so I can take your role as Yokozuna and Queen!"

Looking straight up and shaking a bit in horror, Tsu would look in fear in Ranya, a woman she had remembered from a long time ago. Back when Tsu newly became Queen about a decade ago, the girl had stolen food from her and had tried challenging her, only to lose hard and eventually be caught stealing before being sent to the Gluttony Kingdom as punishment. Back then though, she had only weighed around 200 pounds, less than even the standard Sumo Kingdom citizen.

Now though, Ranya looked at least 3 times as big as Tsu, both in weight and in height. Her gargantuan belly looked like it was completely stuffed to the brim, while her breasts would be sagging down the sides. As for her behind, not only was it extending out from behind the door, but it was extended outward by at least a good few feet.

"W-wow... I did not expect you to escape, but you do realize you gotta get proper paperwork before you can-"

"Hah, you think I would forget something like that?" Reaching into a pocket on her ill-fitting kimono, Ranya would throw a scroll down at Tsu, landing on the queen's belly. "Got it fully signed this morning, so I'm ready to take my title! Let's go!"

Realizing the sheer terror of having to face someone so large, Tsu almost thought a bit about resigning then and there, before her honor as a sumo queen would show itself in full. "W-well, I admit your huge... but as the Yokozuna of this kingdom I must accept. Thankfully, the ring should be cleared by now, so we can begin this duel for the Kingdom if you wish."

Watching Ranya tear apart more of the wall as she tried leaving the throne room, Tsu would look at her servants, all of them shaking in fear from the possibility of serving such a huge queen. Gulping down her fear for a bit, Tsu would follow the challenger, down to the ring, as their match would begin...
1123231211311321323.title: Yokozuna vs Challenger

11232312113113213232.content:
Standing on the ring, Tsu would shake a bit in fear, as Ranya would stomp down, one foot after the other as she got ready to fight. As the challenger stomped down, the ground would quake heavily, with smaller sumos being launched into the air by a bit by the quakes before landing hard with plenty of thuds.

As soon as both sumoes would finish their pre-combat rites, the two would immediately rush at each other, bellies pushing against each other and creating a big quake from the collision between two huge masses. Stuck within a heavy push, Ranya would be the much bigger foe, but thanks to Queen Fit's training she would be able to hold her place, at least for a while.

"Gah, how are you not down yet? I'm three times your size!"

"Size isn't everything..."

Continuing to push back on Ranya, Tsu would nearly get the giant gluttonous sumo to the end of the ring, feeling her opponent nearly move over the rope to signal a ring out. However, before she could fully push the woman out Ranya would lower her hands, before lifting her gut and dropping it, causing the ground to quake much more heavily then before, leaving Tsu to be launched into the air.

"Tsu Futoihime has been launched off her feet, Ranya wins!"

"Hey, you cheated!" Tsu would quickly run to Ranya, who would sit down on her rump as the sumo queen would climb up to her head.

"Ha, no rules against lifting and dropping your gut! All you gotta make sure is that your feet don't rise and that you don't fall out the ring, so technically I followed the rules! Now give me your crown!"

Grabbing onto Tsu's hair, Ranya would rip the crown from the former queen's head as she would plop it on top of her own head, the crown being pretty undersized compared to her own head. Looking down to the ex-Yokozuna, Ranya would pick up and throw the woman, causing her to land into the wall, breaking it as she rolled into a hall.

Furious, Tsu would end up running away, heading off to the train station so she could try to reach another Kingdom to think of a way to reclaim her own throne while also trying to think of a way to make sure Ranya would be unable to try taking the Kingdom again. After a bit of training, the ex-queen would head off to...
11232312113113213232.title: Queen no Longer

choices: She'll lure Ranya to either of those three and try and make her immobile
She'll go to either three and make herself the fattest sumo in all of Saga
Go and tell Sage the situation and free her kingdom
112323121131132132322.content:
However, those supposed weeks would soon turn to months as Tsu stayed within the Fitness Kingdom. "How can this be? This is impossible." Tsu said looking at the scale before turning to the mirror. "I'm...skinny." she said looking at her thin self, not a single ounce of fat was left on her.

"Impossible? Hardly. You've done nothing but train and work out here for months. Of course you were gonna end up as skinny as a rail." Fit said drinking from her thermos.

"I can't fight Ranya like this. She'll flatten me like a pancake." Tsu said with a groan. "Maybe I should train in the Gluttony Kingdom like she did."

"Are you insane? The Gluttony Kingdom is a punishment kingdom. Ordinary citizens aren't allowed in those rulerless areas unless they are criminals." Fit said.

"Right...ugh...sorry. I'm just so depressed. I need to get my kingdom back and her out of my life. And those smells aren't helping." Tsu said referring to the smells of the three most fattening kingdoms wafting in the room before an idea struck her.

"Morning." she said with a happy smile as the maids slowly rolled her out of bed.

Looking at the bars, Psy saw that that were getting taller. She was worried for a moment before she realized the bars weren't getting taller: she was getting shorter.

"What in the world?" Psy asked.

"Why would you make me so short?" Psy asked. "How is this a punishment?"

"So many questions." Sage replied. "I'm proving a point. You will never get Jane back. She's happy the way she is now."

During one of her many, MANY trips to the fast food places dotting Saga to sate her endless hunger, Jane was just leaving a buger joint with 10 bags filling the basket of her mobility scooter. The ONE good thing Jane could say was that, due to how the kingdom operated, nearly everything was free.

As she wheeled down the sidewalk, she saw the endless amounts of scraps lining the roads, from chicken bones to wrappers to rotten fruit. It was a disgusting, heart-breaking sight. But it was in these scraps that things changed.

She heard a soft sobbing come from one of the many piles. Driving over to it, she saw a sight that made her almost cry. Climbing out of the pile was a small child, a girl likely around 11. From the clothes she was wearing, Jane guessed she was from Simpleton, though she was stick thin.

The girl looked at Jane, then at the food in Jane's scooter. Slowly, Jane took one of the many hamburger bags out of her scooter. Her endless hunger was screaming at her to put it back, but Jane's heart told her otherwise. Jane proceeded to give the girl the bag.

"You need this more then I do." Jane said. The child smiled, took the bag, and ran off. Jane smiled. This kingdom was meant to punish, but it wouldn't stop her from being a good person. Starting up her scooter again, she drove home.
------

"What's going on here?" Jane asked, confused.

"I'm....pardoned?" Jane asked.

"Yes. You were sentenced here because you stole food from a noble to feed yourself. However, you fed that starving child who was not even sentenced to our kingdom. That is proof that gluttony has not gotten its grips in you." one of them said.

"So...what will happen to me now?" Jane asked.

"You'll be expelled from the Gluttony Kingdom and forced to look for living elsewhere. Since you have a criminal record, you'll be forced to never take the trains, always going on foot.' they said.

"Uh...I think you mean wheels." Jane said.

"No. That scooter is of the Gluttony Kingdom. It will remain here." another said.

"Oh...I see." Jane said as she sadly got out and onto her legs. "Whoa...been awhile since I was last on my feet." she said.

14532313.content:
Jane wanted more then anything in the world to free the other people in the punishment kingdoms. However, she was just one person, and a person weighing almost 900 pounds at that. There was no way she could free anyone. On top of that, she still had a criminal record. If she stepped out of line, she'd surely be sent back, or worse.

So, she started wandering. It was a slow walk, with all the blubber on her body, but she was at least making progress. She decided that she would start by trying to return to her home, the Puzzle Kingdom. Before her firing, she had been a tester there for the puzzles.

The walk was extremely exhausting. It took Jane nearly 5 days to return to her home kingdom. As she walked, she realized something: despite all of the walking she was doing, she wasn't losing any weight. She knew that her weight wasn't permanent, since she had heard that previous prisoners who were released had managed to slim back down, but she was still a bit confused. Maybe she just lost weight much slower. At least, she hoped.
------
Finally, she arrived at the Puzzle Kingdom. She was beyond tired, and just wanted to find a place to sleep. However, she remembered that mearly entering the Puzzle Kingdom requiered solving a complex puzzle. And she was far too tired to even try.

She started to waddle off when she heard a voice.

"Hey! Miss!"

Turning, she saw a beautiful woman run up to her. The woman was tall and shapely, with black hair, green eyes, and olive colored skin.

Before Jane could say anything, the woman started walking around her, inspecting every inch of Jane's immense body.

"Um, can I help you?" Jane asked.

"Just from a glance, I can tell you're almost 900 pounds." The woman said. "You seemed to have walked all the way here, so I guess you just got released from one of the punishment kingdoms, and based on your body, you just got freed from the Gluttony Kingdom."

Jane nodded, very confused right now. At that, the woman smiled.

"Then you're absolutely perfect!" The woman said. "My name is Nia, and I've been looking for someone like you!"

"Really?" Jane asked.

"Yup. Girls who weigh 800 pounds or more are all the rage right now!" Nia said. "I can be of help to you. You work with me, and I can get your criminal record cleared!"

Jane lit up at that. She couldn't believe it. She'd actually be able to be a normal person again.

"Sure!" Jane replied. "What kingdom are you from that's got this "rage" right now?"

Nia smiled. "Miss, you're looking at one of the best agents in the..."
